description.p: Balatro Mod Manager lets you install, update, and manage Balatro mods with one-click installs, built-in backups, and automatic Lovely setup.

ul.li: Browse and install curated mods with version tracking.
Detect and manage your existing mods and keep Lovely current.
Backup/restore mod lists and quickly clean up broken installs.
Steam Deck friendly: works in Gaming/Desktop mode with no extra system packages.
